EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriMensurationOperation

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

A list of mensuration operations.

[Guid("6340AF9C-6173-48E4-B781-448B5585D8AA")]
public enum esriMensurationOperation

Fields

esriMensurationAreaAndPerimeter = 2

2: Mensuration of the area and perimeter of a polygon.

esriMensurationAreaAndPerimeter3D = 9

9: Mensuration of the 3D area and perimeter of a polygon.

esriMensurationCentroid = 6

6: Mensuration of the centroid of a polygon.

esriMensurationCentroid3D = 13

13: Mensuration of the 3D centroid of a polygon.

esriMensurationDistanceAndAngle = 1

1: Mensuration of the distance, elevation angle, and azimuth angle, between two points.

esriMensurationDistanceAndAngle3D = 8

8: Mensuration of the 3D distance, elevation angle, and azimuth angle, between two points.

esriMensurationHeightFromBaseAndTop = 3

3: Mensuration of the height from the base and top of an object.

esriMensurationHeightFromBaseAndTopShadow = 4

4: Mensuration of the height from the base and top shadow of an object.

esriMensurationHeightFromTopAndTopShadow = 5

5: Mensuration of the height from the top and top shadow of an object.

esriMensurationPoint = 0

0: Mensuration of the point with the error covariance matrix.

esriMensurationPoint3D = 7

7: Mensuration of the 3D point with the error covariance matrix.

esriMensurationVolume = 10

10: Mensuration of the volume of a polygon.
